notes: Prices scraped from studio websites. 'verified: true' means prices were found on the website. 'verified: false' means prices could not be confirmed online.

byoga.notes: Single 75-90min CHF 35, 60min CHF 25. Reduced rates available (students, Kulturlegi). Monthly is 12-month auto-renewal (Tapas Membership). 10-class card valid 6 months.

looking-glass.trial_note: 3x Trial Abo (3 months) CHF 60; Jump In Month unlimited CHF 150
looking-glass.notes: Single 75/90min CHF 30, 60min CHF 20. Reduced rates available. 10-class card valid 6 months. Weekly unlimited CHF 65.

niyama.notes: Single 75min CHF 25, 60min CHF 23. Student single CHF 15-20. 10-class card for 60min classes CHF 220. Monthly unlimited CHF 195 (students CHF 135). Zoom classes CHF 15-25 pay-what-you-can.

anjali.notes: Wix-based site; pricing not accessible via scraping. Contact studio directly.

yogabloom.notes: Sliding scale: Supported CHF 10/100/135, Regular CHF 20/190/180, Supporter CHF 30/270/225. Aerial yoga single CHF 25-35. Listed prices are 'Regular' tier.

volta-yoga.notes: Wix-based site; pricing not accessible via scraping. No pricing page found.

bikram.trial_note: Taster Pass: unlimited for first 8 days, one-time only CHF 55
bikram.notes: 10% student discount (under 26, excl. taster pass). 10-class card valid 1 year. Max 18 students, online reservation required.

meyo-house.notes: Website returned 403 forbidden. Contact studio at 061 556 29 26.

yoga-atelier.notes: No pricing found on homepage or Angebot page. Contact Orsina at +41 79 829 47 45.

ashtanga-basel.notes: Discounted rates for students/low-income/AHV: single CHF 20, 10-class CHF 180, monthly CHF 120. Trial class CHF 20, trial month CHF 100. 10-class card valid 1 year. Cash or bank transfer only.

lotos.notes: Only price range CHF 25-35 found in structured data. No detailed pricing page accessible. Contact sekretariat@lotosyoga.ch or +41 61 271 40 86.

yoga-gaertnerhuus.notes: Wix-based site; pricing not accessible via scraping.

secret-garden.notes: Wix-based site; pricing not found on homepage or schedule page.

mint.notes: Student discount for under 30. Personal training CHF 150/60min. No monthly pass or trial offer listed.

erlenyoga.notes: Site appears private/restricted. Max 8 persons per class.

exhale.notes: Drop-in CHF 30. 10 Lektionen CHF 250, 20 Lektionen CHF 500. Valid 12 months. Personal Training CHF 160/session. No monthly pass offered.

iyengar-kreis.notes: Single CHF 37, students CHF 30, trial CHF 20. Quarterly subscription: classes per quarter x CHF 30. 10-class card listed at CHF 1150 (likely an error or special package - valid 12 months). Payment via bank transfer, TWINT, or cash.

iyengar-gerbergaesslein.notes: Single CHF 36, students CHF 30, trial CHF 20. Quarterly pass: number of classes x CHF 30. 10-class card CHF 1150 valid 12 months (note: this seems high, may be a quarterly/annual package). New students must register by email.

ayalga.notes: No pricing information found on website.

studio-devin.notes: Website connection refused (ECONNREFUSED). Site may be down.

kathrin-mathews.notes: No pricing found on homepage. Contact info@kathrinmathews.com.

mysore-club.notes: No pricing on website. Contact info@mysorebasel.ch.

rin-yoga.notes: Thursday 90min class CHF 30 (reduced CHF 25). 10-class Abo CHF 200 (includes 1 free class). Sliding scale available. Bring-a-friend: your class free. Payment: cash or TWINT.

alessia-yoga.notes: Website returned 403. Description mentions first trial class is free.

food-changes.notes: No pricing on homepage. Holistic approach (yoga + nutrition). Contact Vanessa at +41 79 245 7417.

claudia-stamm.notes: Pregnancy yoga CHF 25/class. Mama Yoga CHF 45. Rückbildungsyoga from CHF 175 (package). Hormon Yoga Workshop CHF 140 (3.5h). Specialized in pregnancy/postnatal.

mignon.notes: No pricing on homepage. Specialized in prenatal/postnatal. Check individual course pages.

katerina-wen.notes: No pricing on homepage. Private sessions and group classes. Book via website booking system.

bethsabe.notes: Single 90min CHF 35, 60min CHF 25. 10-class 90min CHF 290 (valid 6 months), 60min CHF 210. Couples 10-class CHF 510. Limited annual (1x/week) CHF 990, unlimited CHF 1350. Seniors discount available. Private CHF 140/60min. Students (under 30) 15% off subscriptions.

fitnesspark.monthly_note: Monthly payment on annual contract (CHF 1476/year or CHF 1400 upfront)
fitnesspark.notes: Single entry CHF 39 (refundable within 7 days if yearly sub purchased). 10-visit sub CHF 355. Swiss Fit annual CHF 1400 or CHF 123/month. Fit annual CHF 1270 or CHF 112/month. Monthly payment requires CHF 70 admin fee + CHF 10 chip bracelet. Includes gym, wellness, sauna, pool.

gyym.monthly_note: Membership from CHF 55/month (fitness center with yoga included)
gyym.notes: Gym membership from CHF 55/month includes 300+ group classes (yoga, pilates, etc.). 24/7 access. Contact for full pricing: +41 61 633 20 60.

klubschule.notes: Course-based pricing (Migros education system). Individual course prices vary. Check website for current offerings.

unisport.notes: University sports program. Only for Uni Basel students/staff. Course prices not displayed on listing page.

sutra-house.notes: Retreat venue, not a regular studio. No class pricing available. Contact conect@sutra-house.com.

yoba.notes: No website URL available. Contact: 078 725 08 15 or yoga@yoba.ch.
